mnemonics.title: Remembering the Update Rules
mnemonics.content: For Mid-Point Circle Update Rules: Think 'E for Easy Add' and 'SE for Subtract and Extra'. 'Easy Add': When choosing East (E), you add a positive value (4x+6). 'Subtract and Extra': When choosing South-East (SE), the update formula has a subtraction term (4(x-y)) and then an extra +10.
